parts.label: Primary Structure (3U)

parts.label: Cold Gas Thruster x 4

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness at deployer rail joints.
risk.mit: Conduct static load tests and reinforce joints if necessary.

risk.desc: Electrical continuity issues between PC/104 stack and avionics modules.
risk.mit: Perform thorough electrical continuity tests during verification.

risk.desc: Thermal management challenges between solar panels and deployer rails.
risk.mit: Enhance thermal conductivity with additional thermal vias.

risk.desc: Limited service access for avionics and battery modules.
risk.mit: Increase service access points for easier maintenance.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment due to bolted structural interfaces.
risk.mit: Implement precise alignment guides and conduct assembly tests.

physics_paths.description: Transfers load from solar panels to deployer rails.
Heat dissipation from sun exposure to internal avionics.
Power and data distribution from PC/104 stack to avionics modules.

Improve heat dissipation with additional thermal vias.

verification_focus.description: Perform static load tests on deployer rails.
Conduct electrical continuity tests between PC/104 stack and avionics modules.
Measure thermal conductivity between solar panels and deployer rails.
